sandbox: Booted sandboxed per tests/e2e/orchestrator-view.spec.ts: ORCHESTRATOR_CONFIG=temp copy of routing.seed.json, ORCHESTRATOR_PORT/IMPROVER_PORT=free, GARRISON_HOME=temp. Improver seeded with GARRISON_RUNS_DIR of 3 evidence-index fixtures (2 test-failed + 1 passed) + POST /api/run-now -> 1 orchestrator-policy ghost proposal surfaced via the composer's /ghost-edits proxy.
note: AC-1..AC-7 at desktop viewport 1280x2960; AC-8 at iPhone viewport 390x844 letterboxed into the same canvas (viewport-emulated). AC-2's drag driven off-camera (the walkthrough recorder has no drag action) as a real dnd-kit pointer drag; the video shows the persisted cell + recompiled policy.json.

criteria.caption: AC-1 - four surfaces: tray, 18x3 matrix, rails, try-it
criteria.assert: On load: waited for .ghosts, .tray .tcard, table.matrix tbody tr, the full-feature .rail, and .tryit-input; asserted .tryit-input visible. All four surfaces (tray, 18x3 matrix, rails, try-it) render.

criteria.caption: AC-2 - drag set implement x T2-deep to cc-sonnet-med
criteria.assert: A real dnd-kit pointer drag (mouse down on cc-sonnet-med .tcard-grab, move >6px, over the implement x T2-deep cell, mouse up) was driven off-camera via Playwright and returned PUT /routing 200. On camera: asserted the implement row, T2-deep cell now reads target model 'sonnet' (cc-sonnet-med), highlighted.

criteria.caption: AC-3 - the drop recompiled policy.json (model sonnet)
criteria.assert: Evidence panel of policy.json matrix.implement['T2-deep'] (the compiled document the gateway reads). highlight.match "model": "sonnet" present -> the drop autosaved and recompiled policy to cc-sonnet-med.

criteria.caption: AC-4 - effort dial retuned cc-haiku-low to medium
criteria.assert: Clicked the 'medium' effort segment on the cc-haiku-low target card; asserted the card's active dial segment (.dial .seg.on) now reads 'medium' (autosaved; status pill showed 'saved').

criteria.caption: AC-5 - toggled test off in api-change (dimmed, still shown)
criteria.assert: Clicked the 'test' phase chip toggle in the api-change (non-default) rail; asserted that chip is now .chip.off (dimmed) while still present in the rail - off, never hidden.

criteria.caption: AC-6 - dry-run resolved the full rail
criteria.assert: Filled the try-it input with 'implement a login page with tests' and clicked Dry run; asserted .tryit-out contains the kind/tier/type pills (kind: full-feature, tier: T1-standard, type: implement, interactive) above a resolved .tryit-rail of per-phase chips each carrying a skill + model/effort/runtime target.

criteria.caption: AC-7 - Improver proposals: nothing auto-applies
criteria.assert: Asserted the Improver proposals panel (.ghosts) shows 1 pending orchestrator-policy proposal (test gate failed in 2/3 full-feature runs) with Accept and Dismiss actions and the text 'review before applying'. Accept was NOT clicked (nothing auto-applies).

criteria.caption: AC-8 - iPhone 390x844: matrix scrolls in its own container
criteria.assert: iPhone viewport 390x844: asserted the T0-trivial matrix column header inside .matrix-scroll; verified (Playwright metrics) document.body.scrollWidth==390==innerWidth (no page horizontal overflow) while .matrix-scroll scrollWidth 569 > clientWidth 356 (the matrix scrolls in its own container). Recorded at 390x844, letterboxed into the shared 1280x2960 canvas.
